calendar.matters:
Petition For Allowance Of Compensation To Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Amanda Ebey, Esq., for and with Ahmad Mohazab, Petitioner.

At the outset, Ms. Ebey confirms the status of the trust administration. The court advises Ms. Ebey that if this is the successor trustee's sole request it intends to take the matter under submission with the intent to grant, otherwise, the court will require the trust to be modified. No objection to the court's intent is presented and the subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Nguyen. Not Reported.
